title: CleanerF3
description: A minecraft mod that allows you to edit more F3 settings such as hiding targeted block tags. This is a somewhat updated version of CleanF3.
body:
This mod allows the removal of some f3 options that are not possible in vanilla.
For instance, you can disable targeted block tags and targeted block states.
You can also disable the f3 debug hint that takes up a lot of space on your screen especially in guis. Overall this mod just cleans up the f3 screen and makes it more customizable to everyone.

Here are some images of this mod:

Simplfified Position and changed position text
![Simplified position and simplified direction showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lk4kDFc2/images/7fc311887b2ef3c403e295b92c449d6f449a6939.png)

Nothing changed:
![F3 screen with nothing changed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lk4kDFc2/images/ea847ba1a5b82009f862c7db8f8615c55423232c.png)

Targeted block tags and state disabled as well as debug hint disabled
![only targeted block shown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Lk4kDFc2/images/3854b2ca1b25e7682c787dc7733009c743099ec3.png)
